AI-Powered Customer Communications Platform for SMBs & Enterprise | Aircall
Login
EN
English (GB)
English (AU)
Français
Deutsch
Español
Español (MX)
Customer communications, evolved 
 
with AI that
 
handles customer interactions, end to end.
TRY FOR FREE
23,000+ companies TRUST AIRCALL 
to power their customer communications
Aircall
is
 
the
 
intuitive,
 
AI-powered
 
platform
 
bringing
 
together
 
intelligent
 
voice
 
agents,
 
 automated
 
workflows,
 
&
 
adaptive
 
real-time
 
coaching
 
at
 
scale.
 
TEAM-LED
Team-led customer conversations powered by a modern phone system.
Native integrations with CRM, help desk, and business tools automatically sync conversations and customer data across your systems.
Clear and reliable calling
Enterprise-grade connectivity and crystal-clear audio keep every conversation stable, secure, and high quality.
One collaborative workspace
A shared inbox keeps every conversation visible, giving your team the ability to collaborate in real time and step in without losing context.
Connected across every channel
Calls, SMS, and messaging live in one platform, keeping every interaction connected to your CRM, help desk, and business tools.
AI-ASSISTED
AI Assistants that support your team in real time.
AI Assistants support your team during live conversations, analyze every interaction, and complete follow-up work automatically.
Live coaching during calls
AI Assistants provide real-time guidance and suggested responses, improving performance in every conversation.
Live transcription and insights
AI Assistants transcribe every call and analyze sentiment, topics, and key moments giving managers immediate visibility into performance and trends.
Automated follow-ups and CRM updates
AI Assistants capture notes, update CRM records, and create follow-up tasks automatically reducing manual work after every conversation.
AI-LED
AI Agents that provide 24/7 customer coverage.
AI Agents answer instantly, resolve routine requests automatically, and escalate complex issues with full context when needed.
Autonomous resolution
AI Agents identify caller intent, gather key details, and resolve routine inquiries end to end.
Always-on availability
AI Agents handle after-hours calls, manage peak volume, and respond to repetitive requests automatically.
Escalation with full context
AI Agents escalate complex issues with complete conversation history and customer context.

Aircall makes everything so simple for my team.
You don’t need to be technical at all,
that’s part of the beauty of it.
Anthony Messina

llm_raw.description: A cloud-based AI-powered phone and customer communication platform that integrates voice, SMS, and messaging with CRM and help desk tools.
llm_raw.notes: Aircall has a well-documented public REST API (developer.aircall.io) enabling telephony management, contact sync, and call analytics. Integration with AI agents is natively supported through their webhook and API ecosystem.
